MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DOE 2'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Doe 2's motion to strike prayer for treble damages, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. As pleaded against Defendant Doe 2, page 26, paragraph 5, line 9 of Plaintiff Jane Doe's prayer for relief in her Complaint for Personal Injuries and Damages, praying "[f]or treble damages, as authorized by section 340.1 of the Code of Civil Procedure" is ordered STRICKEN WITH PREJUDICE.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
